body_txt: Vapor Wear is clothing designed in such a way that is is obvious the character could not be possibly wearing any underwear, meaning bra, panties or both, and worn with the intent to titillate the audience. Any underclothes seem to be made of air — or, should we say, Vapor Wear . This design choice is usually made for female characters as a form of Fanservice , but the trope is not gender exclusive. Common ways an outfit can be designed to make it appear there’s nothing under there is to expose the hips through cutouts or slits or showing Sideboob , Underboobs or the back, where one usually would expect to see bra straps or a bra band. Methods to expose the areas include: This usually leads to a very Stripperiffic outfit and is frequently a significant factor in the Theiss Titillation Theory . While Vapor Wear might be used to show The Vamp , the Femme Fatale or Succubi and Incubi as sexually forward through Meaningful Appearance , Rule of Sexy means that pretty much every kind of female character, seductive personality or not, can be clothed this way. Vapor Wear is most common in Science Fiction and Fantasy , but also often used in Historical Fiction (but more often that not, this is not historically correct — most people did wear underwear in ancient times, though it may not have looked like what is worn today). For the cases where the audience is being told or shown that no underwear is being worn without such a costume (e.g. if a skirt needs to be flipped to make it obvious), see Going Commando . Since Vapor Wear is a costume design trope, examples where the lack of underwear is only exposed when the clothes get soaking wet or damaged should be listed under those tropes instead. For characters completely covered by clothes, but implied to be naked due to their transforming powers, see Technically Naked Shapeshifter . For characters appearing to wear something covering their naughty bits, but that something being their own fur, scales or something else, see Fur Bikini or Organic Bra . Not to be confused with Censor Steam , Vaporware or Vaporwave . noreallife
